title: Registration Rail Change
prompt:
Create a production-ready Registration Rail Change using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a route-change transition inside a light Bento card: two content destinations share a vertical registration rail, and activating the other destination slides a single coral registration mark to its new row while the card copy crossfades. Use a #F4F5F6 surrounding field, white content surface, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Coral is the only bright accent. Never apply a gradient to the card.

Use two semantic buttons in a labelled navigation group. The active button has aria-current=page, targets are at least 44px, and a polite live region announces the newly shown route. Click, Enter, and Space perform identical activation. Hover can lift a button 2px over 180ms; press can compress it 1px over 90ms. The registration mark moves with a spring of stiffness 360 and damping 29, while the route content changes with a 200ms opacity and 10px transform transition. Keep both route labels present so the transition is understandable without motion.

At 320px, maintain a narrow rail and readable copy; at larger sizes, let the content panel grow naturally without fixed positioning. Use transform and opacity rather than layout hacks. Maintain AA contrast, dark 3px focus rings, and logical tab order. Avoid timers, remote assets, storage, random values, network calls, and dynamic code. Under prefers-reduced-motion, make the change instant or use a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and runnable pure CSS fallback with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
ExploreCommit
Collect signals.
*/ .uiwiki-registration{display:grid;grid-template-columns:84px 1fr;gap:16px;max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-registration nav{border-right:1px solid #ececee}.uiwiki-registration a{display:block;min-height:44px;padding:12px 0;color:#111;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-registration a[aria-current]{border-left:4px solid #fb7185}.uiwiki-registration a:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-registration *{transition:none}}
